targets.rawSql: SELECT m.name AS merchant, sum(t.total_amount) AS gmv FROM silver.transactions_silver t JOIN silver.merchants_silver m ON t.merchant_id = m.merchant_id WHERE t._ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY merchant ORDER BY gmv DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT toStartOfHour(_ingested_at) AS ts, countIf(status = 'approved') * 100.0 / count() AS approval_rate FROM silver.transactions_silver WHERE _ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts
SELECT countIf(status = 'approved') * 100.0 / count() AS bnpl_penetration FROM silver.transactions_silver WHERE _ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
SELECT quantile(0.95)(decision_latency_ms) AS p95_latency FROM silver.transactions_silver WHERE _ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

SELECT m.name AS merchant, count() AS txn_count, sum(t.total_amount) AS total_gmv, countIf(t.status = 'approved') * 100.0 / count() AS approval_pct FROM silver.transactions_silver t JOIN silver.merchants_silver m ON t.merchant_id = m.merchant_id WHERE t._ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY merchant ORDER BY txn_count DESC LIMIT 10
